response.justification: Over 15 years of full-stack development with a current Staff Engineer role directly involving TypeScript, Node.js, AI agent infrastructure, and MCP framework development maps tightly to the role's core requirements; prior experience at Optilyz covers React, AWS, and MongoDB explicitly, and a career-long commitment to TDD and software craftsmanship aligns well with the team's quality expectations. The only meaningful gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience.
strengths: Current role includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development — a direct hit on the role's AI agent requirement
Demonstrated full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS stack across multiple production roles
Deep, consistent testing culture: TDD practitioner, workshop facilitator, and author of a testing library
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js anywhere in the resume
No Kotlin experience listed; Java appears only briefly in embedded/robotics contexts, not backend services
No explicit mention of Vitest or Playwright; testing tool specifics are underspecified

key_factors.factor: AI agent + MCP experience in current role
